positive: A maximalist, psychedelic cosmic forest illustration. Highly detailed arrangement of stylized flora (e.g., bioluminescent ferns, giant glowing mushrooms, intricate crystalline vines) intertwined with nebular elements and celestial bodies. The scene features a central, majestic, stylized moon rising over geometric cosmic peaks. Style is a mix of Art Nouveau curvature and sharp, vaporwave symmetry, utilizing deep indigo blues, vibrant teal, luminous gold accents, and soft lavender gradients. Composition must be highly balanced and suitable for seamless apparel printing, featuring clean, defined silhouettes against a rich, dark background. Vector art aesthetic, high contrast, symmetrical, ornate.
